label: UI
description: User interface preferences such as timezone, time/date formatting, and units.

timezone.label: Override UI timezone
timezone.description: Optional timezone to display across the UI (defaults to browser local time if unset).

time_format.label: Override UI time format
time_format.description: Time format to use in the UI (browser, 12hour, or 24hour).

date_style.label: Override UI dateStyle
date_style.description: Date style to use in the UI (full, long, medium, short).

time_style.label: Override UI timeStyle
time_style.description: Time style to use in the UI (full, long, medium, short).

unit_system.label: The unit system to use for measurements
unit_system.description: Unit system for display (metric or imperial) used in the UI and MQTT.
